titleStmt.title: SII 27.219: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 219. (A.R. No. 257 of 1931-32.) KACHCHŪRU (KŌṬAKĒRI), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar built into the wall near the hōmakuṇḍa in the Pañchalingēśvara temple.

This records the approval by the queen of a gift of a garden and a house made by Niḍumbarāya to Śaṅkara-bhaṭṭa to enable the latter to provide five hāni of rice for offerings to god Mārkaṇḍēśvaradēva on the occasion of Māsa-saṁkramaṇas. It states that the Queen gave approval while giving audience in her palace at Bārahakanyāpura where the five pradhānas were also present.
It is dated the cyclic year Sarvadhāri, Śrāvaṇa ba. 5, Monday the details corresponding to 1288 A.D., July 19, falling in the reign period of the Queen.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svastiśrīmatu paṭṭada piriyarasi ballamahādēThe letter is engraved above the line.
viyara vijeyarājya muttarōtta rā
bhi viprāvrirdhamāna mācaṁdra tāForvriddhi vravardhamāna
raṁbaraṁ saluttamirdda sarvadhāri sava
tsarada śrāvaṇa ba 5 sō śrīmatu
bārakaṁnyāpurada Aramane
yalu paṁcapradhānaruṁ tālu
voḍḍolagaṁgoṭṭu yiddu
niḍuṁbarāyaru śaṁkhara bhaṭṭari
ge koṭṭa dharmmakke besesidaru brahma
Urada vūriṁda vāḍiyatōṭa
vanū maneya 1 mārkaṁḍēsvaradēva
rige māsa saṁkramaṁgaḷige dēvara
hāniyali Aydu hāni yakkiya
naḍasuUdāgi nāyamūlavā
gi saṁkhara bhaṭṭara saṁtānava saṁtā
na vāgi koṭṭar Ī dharmma viphnava
māḍidavaru vāraṇā sā
virakavileya koṁda pāpa
hōhar . śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
